confirmed_bug: The main Responses stream could stop at [DONE] before a later response.completed event, producing stream closed before response.completed.
negative_change: Terminal events detached the remaining upstream body into background drain tasks that could overlap later Codex calls.

gzip_ab.decision: Disabling gzip was negative for this direct route; restore the provider gzip setting.

recovery.baseline: v0.1.89 single foreground stream through upstream EOF
